name: Chargebee
description: Manage subscriptions, customers, invoices, and plans in Chargebee. Update the base URL in Settings to your Chargebee site (your-site.chargebee.com/api/v2).

auth.hint: Go to Settings → Configure Chargebee → API Keys. In the API Key field enter: Basic <base64 of "API_KEY:">  (note the colon with empty password).

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List all subscriptions with their plan, status, billing period, and customer.

params.name: status[is]
params.description: Filter by status: active, cancelled, in_trial, or paused

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get full details for a subscription including plan, add-ons, and next billing date.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices with their amount, status, and due date.

params.name: status[is]
params.description: Filter: paid, posted, payment_due, not_paid, or voided

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List Chargebee customers with their email, company, and billing address.
